changed_files_note: None of the 20 changed files are commands/*.md or agents/*.md. All findings are pre-existing / full-repo advisory. All findings tagged introduced_in_diff: false per Mechanism (ii) tagging contract.

findings.recommendation: Apply 'rules not stories' principle: extract JSON Storage Policy, Integration with /clean, Quality Standards Enforcement, and Agent Development Use Cases (233 combined lines) to docs/dev/. Reduce Example End-to-End Workflow to a 5-step skeleton. Remove Success Metrics (marketing checklist). Target: reduce from 1505 to ~1260 lines (-16%). Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631) reduced 113 lines (-22%).

Apply 'rules not stories' principle: extract JSON Storage Policy, Integration with /clean, Quality Standards Enforcement, and Agent Development Use Cases (154 combined lines) to docs/dev/command-development-patterns.md. Compress Example End-to-End Workflow to a 5-step skeleton. Remove Success Metrics. Target: reduce from 1122 to ~905 lines (-19%). Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631).

Apply 'rules not stories' principle: Common Anti-Patterns to Avoid (63 lines of BAD/GOOD code examples) should be extracted to docs/dev/dev-anti-patterns.md with a pointer. Example Execution (52 lines) can be compressed to a 10-line skeleton. Target: reduce from 1007 to ~892 lines (-11%). Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631).

Apply 'rules not stories' principle: State File Management JSON schema (77 lines) should be extracted to docs/dev/overnight-state-schema.json with a one-line pointer. Quality Standards Enforcement and JSON Storage Policy (12 combined lines) are duplicates of content in docs/ and can be removed. Overview flowchart (56 lines, not counted here) is operational topology and should be renamed ## Operational Flow to avoid triggering future false positives. Target: reduce from 1807 to ~1710 lines (-5%). Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631).

Apply 'rules not stories' principle: Example Execution (72 lines of fictional JSON/walkthrough) duplicates the verification process described in the workflow. Compress to a 15-20 line skeleton showing input paths, criterion mapping, verification evidence, and PASS/FAIL output shape. Target reduction: ~52 lines. Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631).
findings.codex_note: OBSERVATION_ONLY per codex feedback — defensible as minor verbosity finding.

observations_only.note: Philosophy section (L13-18, 6 lines) is clearly verbose and should be removed. Other flagged sections (Safety Features, Quality Standards, Helper Scripts Used, Usage) are operational references, not story prose — not counted as verbose per codex feedback.
Example Commit Messages section (L71-101, 31 lines) is below the >50 lines warning threshold. Consider replacing two full commit examples with one concise canonical example.

Overview section (L56-111, 56 lines) is an operational flowchart diagram for the overnight loop. Recommend renaming to ## Operational Flow to avoid future false positives from name-matching against the verbose-section pattern list.

summary.estimated_reduction: 10-20% per critical file; 5-10% per minor file

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex identified 9 blockers and 1 observation. Key corrections: (1) checkpoint.md and stop.md are false positives (sections too small or procedural); (2) quick-commit.md examples below >50 line threshold; (3) clean.md over-flags procedural sections; (4) dev-command.md and commands/dev.md miss critical verbose sections (JSON Storage Policy, Integration with /clean, Quality Standards Enforcement, Agent Development Use Cases) — should be reclassified CRITICAL; (5) dev-overnight.md Overview is operational flowchart not prose; (6) agents/dev.md missing Common Anti-Patterns section, should be MAJOR. Codex also recommended returning empty findings in --changed-files mode (rejected — contradicts Mechanism ii tagging contract).

findings.issue: Recommends returning findings:[] since no .md files changed in diff
findings.rationale: Contradicts Mechanism (ii) tagging contract. Inspector must emit full-repo advisory findings tagged introduced_in_diff:false. Returning empty findings would silently suppress pre-existing dirt from advisory context. The default-safe rule already ensures all such findings are non-blocking.

findings.issue: commands/checkpoint.md is a false positive — Usage 12 lines procedural, Examples 9 lines below >50 threshold
findings.rationale: Examples section is 9 lines, far below the >50 line warning threshold. Usage section contains substantive bash invocation + step list, not tutorial prose.

findings.issue: commands/quick-commit.md Example Commit Messages (31 lines) below >50 threshold
findings.rationale: 31 lines < 50 line warning threshold for Examples sections. Moved to observations_only.

findings.issue: commands/stop.md Usage (8 lines) is substantive invocation documentation; major severity unjustified for 8 raw lines
findings.rationale: 8 verbose lines is below the minor threshold (50 lines). Percentage-based escalation (16%) on a tiny file produces misleading severity. Section is a one-line invocation + argument description.

findings.issue: commands/clean.md over-flags Safety Features, Quality Standards, Helper Scripts Used, Usage as verbose
findings.proposed_fix: Only Philosophy (6 lines) is removable; rest are operational references
findings.rationale: Safety Features, Helper Scripts Used, and Usage in context are operationally procedural (describe active workflow safety steps and script inventory). Downgraded to observation-only. Philosophy remains the only clear story prose at 6 lines.

findings.issue: commands/dev-command.md misses critical verbose sections — JSON Storage Policy, Integration with /clean, Quality Standards Enforcement, Agent Development Use Cases = 154 additional lines
findings.rationale: Extended pattern scan confirms 217 verbose lines. Reclassified to CRITICAL.

findings.issue: commands/dev.md misses critical verbose sections — same categories plus Agent Development Use Cases 133 lines = 243 total verbose lines
findings.rationale: Extended pattern scan confirms 243 verbose lines. Reclassified to CRITICAL.

findings.issue: commands/dev-overnight.md Overview flowchart is operational topology not redundant frontmatter prose
findings.proposed_fix: Remove Finding 8 or mark OBSERVATION_ONLY; rename ## Overview to ## Operational Flow
findings.rationale: Overview section is an ASCII flowchart of the overnight loop — operational topology needed for execution. Moved to observations_only. Other genuinely verbose sections (State File Management, JSON Storage Policy, Quality Standards Enforcement) retained as findings with reduced verbose_lines count.

findings.issue: agents/dev.md missing Common Anti-Patterns to Avoid (63 lines); aggregate verbose_lines should be 115, severity MAJOR
findings.proposed_fix: Reclassify agents/dev.md as MAJOR with both sections
findings.rationale: Common Anti-Patterns section contains 63 lines of BAD/GOOD code examples. While substantive, it is reference documentation that belongs in docs/dev/. Reclassified to MAJOR. Integration with QA Subagent (15 lines) excluded as procedural contract specification.

findings.issue: agents/qa.md Example Execution (72 lines) defensible as minor verbosity
findings.rationale: Logged as observation in finding recommendation.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Applied 8 of 9 blocker corrections. Rejected Issue 1 (empty findings recommendation) as contradicting Mechanism (ii) tagging contract. Reclassified dev.md and dev-command.md from minor to critical. Removed false positive findings for checkpoint.md, stop.md. Downgraded quick-commit.md and clean.md to observations-only. Reclassified agents/dev.md from minor to major. Removed dev-overnight.md Overview from findings (moved to observations). Added additional verbose sections per codex extended scan.
